# HPD.ML.Transforms.KeyToValueTransform

- Package: `HPD-ML-Transforms` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Transforms`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Transforms`
- Kind: `class`

Maps integer keys back to original string values. The inverse of ValueToKeyTransform.

public sealed class KeyToValueTransform : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ITransform
